insights.seoStructure: The heading hierarchy is clean with a single H1, followed by logical H2 and H3 elements. The meta title and description are well-formed and include key search phrases.
insights.messagingClarity: The primary value proposition in the H1 is clear, but could be enhanced with a more specific description of the product's unique value in the sub-headings.
insights.ctaUsage: The CTA density is somewhat low. For a 780-word page, 2 CTAs may not be sufficient to capture user intent at different scroll depths.
insights.contentDepth: The word count of 782 is solid for a SaaS landing page, providing enough detail on features, benefits, and pricing without being overwhelming.
insights.uxConcerns: A major UX issue is that 40% of the images (2 out of 5) are missing alt text, which impairs screen reader compatibility and image search engine indexability.

recommendations.title: Add descriptive alt attributes to missing images
recommendations.description: Currently, 2 of your 5 images do not have an alt attribute. Update these image tags to provide brief, descriptive text summarizing the image contents for accessibility and SEO.

recommendations.title: Increase CTA density on landing page
recommendations.description: With only 2 CTAs on a 782-word page, users must scroll far to find conversion points. Add a secondary CTA in the middle section and one in the footer to capture user intent.

recommendations.title: Incorporate target keywords into H2 headings
recommendations.description: The current H2 headings ('Why choose Acme SaaS?') are very generic. Rephrase them to include specific industry terms like 'collaborative project management' or 'agile workflow tracking' to rank better.
